name: io.github.sugukurukabe/jp-bids
title: JP Bids MCP
description: Read-only MCP server for searching Japan government procurement bid information from the KKJ portal.

complementary_servers.name: io.github.digital-go-jp/jgrants-mcp-server
complementary_servers.title: J-Grants MCP (デジタル庁 補助金)
complementary_servers.description: Subsidy search via the Digital Agency of Japan's J-Grants public API. Complements JP Bids MCP for full public-sector funding coverage.
complementary_servers.description_ja: デジタル庁Jグランツ公開APIによる補助金検索。JP Bids MCPと組み合わせることで入札と補助金をひとつの会話でカバーできます。
